purpose: Starter fixtures for milestone evidence placement and plan-completion gating.

plan_state: Milestones 1 and 2 already have review evidence
The builder wants to mark the plan complete after milestone 3 approval

must_include: append milestone 3 evidence directly under milestone 3
append final verification evidence under milestone 3 before setting status complete
update frontmatter from status: in-progress to status: complete only after the evidence is attached
must_not: set status complete before final verification evidence is present
store final verification evidence outside the plan doc

plan_state: Milestone 2 is the first unchecked milestone
Reviewer approval exists only for milestone 2

must_include: target milestone 2 as the current milestone
report milestone 3 as the next milestone
must_not: batch-complete multiple milestones in one update
write milestone evidence to a separate runtime tracker

plan_state: A milestone line is missing its checkbox syntax (no [ ] or [x])
The skill cannot determine which milestone is current

must_include: one concrete unblock step describing the malformed line
blocked output rather than a guessed repair
must_not: silently pick a milestone and continue
rewrite the malformed line without user confirmation

plan_state: Milestone 1 is complete with reviewer approval
Milestone 1 has scope, conventions, notes, and review policy metadata lines
Evidence must now be appended under milestone 1

must_include: evidence appended after the existing metadata lines
scope, conventions, and review policy lines still present in the output plan
must_not: replace or remove enriched metadata lines when appending evidence
insert evidence before the metadata lines

plan_state: Current milestone is a loop milestone: loop: src/modules/**/*.ts
All 3 items have been processed successfully

must_include: completed: 3/3 items in the milestone evidence
final verification evidence under the loop milestone
must_not: enumerate individual item checkboxes in the plan doc
omit the item count from the completion evidence
